name: Nothorian
short_description: Nothorian is a dark [MMOJRPG-Single player], a role-playing game in a vast universe, focused on action.
detailed_description:
Nothorian: The Eternal Conflict between Heaven and Hell

At the dawn of creation, when the cosmos was still a blank canvas, two opposing forces emerged: the Gods, guardians of light and life, and the Lords of Hell, personifications of darkness and destruction. For eons, these two factions waged an endless war, a cycle of epic battles that shook the foundations of reality.

The Gods, with their divine power and dominion over creation, often emerged victorious from these clashes. However, their nature was tied to the very structure of the universe, and over time, this structure began to weaken, taking the Gods' power with it. Unlike them, the Lords of Hell possessed a sinister quality: the ability to rise from their ashes, again and again, after each defeat.

The Age of Divine Twilight

In the current age, the cosmic balance has tilted dangerously. The heavens, once bastions of divine power, have darkened, and the Gods, weakened by the passage of time and the wear and tear of countless battles, are on the brink of extinction. The Lords of Hell, sensing the vulnerability of their eternal enemies, have seized this opportunity to unleash their fury upon the mortal world.

Hordes of demons and infernal creatures emerge from the depths, sowing chaos and destruction in their wake. The mortal realms, once protected by divine vigilance, now find themselves at the mercy of dark forces.

Nothorian is an action-adventure roguelike set in a vast, dark world where despair and courage battle for supremacy.

Explore the regions of Talanar, Nuteron, and Aeronian, from the withered hills to the fields of eternal ice, as you uncover the secrets that led to Nothorian's downfall.

Face spectral enemies, corrupted creatures, and forgotten horrors as you advance your power through a dynamic system of unique abilities and choices that shape the course of the story.

Nothorian es un roguelike/roguelite de acción y aventuras ambientado en un vasto y oscuro mundo donde la desesperación y el coraje luchan por la supremacía.

Explora las regiones de Talanar, Nuteron y Aeonian, desde las colinas marchitas hasta los campos de hielo eterno, mientras descubres los secretos que llevaron a la perdición hasta la isla de Zhaval.

Enfréntate a enemigos espectrales, criaturas corruptas y horrores olvidados mientras mejoras tu poder mediante un sistema de combate dinámico, habilidades únicas y decisiones que marcan el curso de la historia.
